scripts.build: rm -rf dist dist-ios dist-macos && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && mkdir -p dist-ios dist-macos && esbuild src/content-script-entry.ts --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=safari17 --outfile=dist-ios/content.js --external:browser && esbuild src/background-entry.ts --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=safari17 --outfile=dist-ios/background.js --external:browser && esbuild src/popup-entry.ts --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=safari17 --outfile=dist-ios/popup.js --external:browser && cp src/popup.html dist-ios/popup.html && cp -r icons dist-ios/icons && cp -R dist-ios/. dist-macos && node scripts/create-platform-manifest.mjs ios dist-ios/manifest.json && node scripts/create-platform-manifest.mjs macos dist-macos/manifest.json && node scripts/verify-build-output.mjs
scripts.dev: echo "Safari extension dev workflow is not implemented yet"
